task_description: Polish the CareVista UI to make it more graphic, visual, and easy to use for carers and staff. Add hover animations, gradients, progress indicators, larger icons, colored badges, and touch-friendly improvements across global CSS, CarerDashboard, TaskBoard, Residents, CareNotes, and sidebar navigation.

verification.summary: tsc + vite build succeeds with zero errors. Semantic review completed, issues fixed. All changes are purely visual/style with no logic changes. 5 commits total.
